header_note: Pointer / converted copy of D:/ConsultX_Clean/generated/consultx_brain_v1/group_m_advisory_decision_tree_v1.json. This decision tree guides Advisory reasoning. It is NOT legal source. Cite Section 903.2.7 and Section 907.2.7 verbatim from sources alongside any verdict.

ar: كم عدد الطوابق في المبنى، وما هي مساحة كل طابق بالمتر المربع؟
كم عدد الطوابق الواقعة فوق منسوب التسوية؟
هل المبنى (أو حيز المجموعة M) مزود حاليا بشبكة رشاشات؟
هل المبنى مجمع تجاري مغطى أو مفتوح يتوافق مع القسم 402 من كود البناء السعودي 201؟
هل يتم عرض وبيع أثاث منجد أو مراتب، وإذا نعم فما إجمالي مساحة العرض والبيع بالمتر المربع؟
ما إجمالي حمولة الإشغال لجميع طوابق المجموعة M مجتمعة؟
ما حمولة الإشغال الواقعة فوق أو تحت أدنى مستوى لتفريغ الخروج؟
en: How many floors does the building have, and what is the area (in square metres) of each floor?
How many stories are located above the grade plane?
Is the building (or the Group M tenant space) currently sprinklered?
Is the building a covered mall or open mall complying with SBC 201 Section 402?
Is upholstered furniture or mattresses displayed and offered for sale, and if so, what is the total display + sale area in square metres?
What is the total occupant load for all Group M floors combined?
What is the occupant load located above, or below, the lowest level of exit discharge?

steps.title: Classify occupancy
steps.prompt: Is the building use Mercantile (Group M) per SBC 201 Section 309?

branches.effect: ask user — what occupancy group? if not M, escalate to general advisory-occupancy-classification

steps.title: Identify missing inputs
steps.prompt: Confirm all required inputs are present. If any are missing, emit Arabic + English clarifying questions and stop.

branches.effect: emit missing-info questions; do not proceed

steps.title: Compute Group M fire area per floor
steps.prompt: Is any single Group M fire area on any floor greater than 1115 m2?

steps.title: Check stories-above-grade trigger
steps.prompt: Is the Group M fire area located more than three stories above the grade plane?

steps.title: Compute combined Group M area
steps.prompt: Is the combined Group M fire area on all floors (including mezzanines) greater than 2230 m2?

steps.title: Sub-clause check 903.2.7.1 — high-piled storage
steps.prompt: Is merchandise stored in high-piled or rack-storage arrays?

branches.effect: Chapter 32 of SBC 801 also applies; mark as analytical follow-up for human review

steps.title: Sub-clause check 903.2.7.2 — upholstered furniture
steps.prompt: Does the display + sale area for upholstered furniture or mattresses exceed 465 m2?

steps.title: Group M alarm trigger 907.2.7
steps.prompt: Apply Section 907.2.7: combined Group M occupant load >= 500, OR occupant load above or below the lowest level of exit discharge > 100, triggers manual fire alarm system.

steps.title: Apply 907.2.7 Exceptions
steps.prompt: Evaluate Section 907.2.7 exceptions: covered/open mall complying with SBC 201 Section 402; or fully sprinklered per Section 903.3.1.1 with waterflow-activated occupant notification.

branches.effect: manual fire alarm boxes optional; underlying alarm system requirement may still apply — do not infer blanket exemption

steps.title: Render verdict and missing-info checklist
steps.prompt: Aggregate verdicts and emit final advisory output.

outputs.conditional_flag: true if any input was assumed
outputs.assumptions_list: every assumption listed in plain language
outputs.missing_info_restated: restate missing-info checklist alongside the verdict

steps.citation_requirement: Always cite Section 903.2.7 and Section 907.2.7 verbatim from the source files alongside the verdict; synthesis is not legal source.
